headline: Robinhood joins biggest S&P500 losers list
summary: Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) is starting March under pressure. It has come out as among the top of the S&P 500’s year-to-date losers. The S&P 500 is a stock market index that tracks the performance of 500 of the largest publicly traded companies in the United States. Robinhood is a ...

headline: Bitcoin Dropping to $60,000 Could Crush Every Stock Inside This $1.2B ETF
summary: Most ETFs give you sector exposure. The Amplify Transformational Data Sharing ETF (NYSEARCA:BLOK) goes further, concentrating in companies structurally tied to blockchain adoption — crypto exchanges, miners, Bitcoin treasury holders, and fintech platforms building on-chain infrastructure. That’s a compelling mandate in a bull market, and a punishing one when Bitcoin turns. Investors are feeling both ... Bitcoin Dropping to $60,000 Could Crush Every Stock Inside This $1.2B ETF

headline: Robinhood Goes Live With Pilot of Advisor Referral Program
summary: Under the Robinhood Advisor Network, which will be launched more broadly in the second quarter, RIAs will pay a portion of the gross revenue derived from referrals to Robinhood Asset Management, which operates the program.

headline: Iran war prediction market bets draw heat: 'Insane this is legal'

headline: More low- and middle-income Americans are investing, report finds. Here's why
summary: Since 2020, the number of low- and moderate-income investors has increased 2.7 times, or 167%, according to a new BlackRock Foundation and Commonwealth report.
